title: After the Oka Sho: Cherry-blossom Scenery.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Bueeena Vistaaaa～!!
That's one crown down! Congratulations～!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(This is incredible…! The sound alone is almost
overwhelming. So this is a Classic race…!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I kind of want to hear even louder cheers.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm so glad I won!
Thank you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
—! T-That straightforward gratitude…!
And that pure, unclouded smile…!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Man, she's got an incredible kick. No doubt
about it, she's the top favorite for this year's
Tiara races!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…As expected of you, Buena.
You truly belong at the center of applause.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …That is why it must be you.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
If I can surpass you… it would be nothing
short of a miracle. And beyond that…
"that place" awaits.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Woooooahhhhh!!
Bueeena Vistaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Now then. This attention… though I hardly
deserve it, perhaps I shall partake in it as well.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Trainer!
Buena Vista… has won!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere of a Classic race really is
something special…!
choice_data_list: Was the view just as special?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Everyone's smiles, their voices…
it all sparkled so brightly.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If I could move even more people's hearts
through victory… I wonder what kind of view
that would become.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure of it now. Up ahead… there's
a breathtaking view waiting for us!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, a press conference was held.
Once Buena Vista's victory had been
thoroughly celebrated…

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Looking ahead… is the plan to aim for the
"Oaks"?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
In recent years, runners like Vodka have won
the Japan Derby, opening up new paths for
strong Tiara contenders.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista's performance today was
outstanding as well.  Is there any plan to
challenge for the top of her generation?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for your expectations!
But I'll be continuing down this path.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the Oaks, and stand at the pinnacle
of the Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And I'm really looking forward to seeing the
wonderful view that awaits there.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Alright! A question for the trainer! The Oaks
is held at Tokyo Racecourse, over 2400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
That's a significant increase from today's
1600 meters, how do you view that change
in distance?
choice_data_list: The added distance won't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Ohh～, now that's confidence! Hearing it from
someone who's been watching her so closely,
I'm sure it must be true.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
…Judging from today's run, it seems she still
has plenty of room to improve. With your
guidance, trainer, she may grow even further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, I notice the reporters' tone, it's
different from before. More familiar. Perhaps
they're starting to recognize me as well.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Well then, is there anything else—

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
—Can you see it?
The world you are meant to reach?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for the interruption.
I shall be brief, so I ask for your indulgence.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Red Desire…!?
She just walked in… what's going on…?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Now then, everyone. Have you ever felt…
that there exists a world more fitting for you?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: I have. And one day, I received a revelation.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: A spotlight!? Where did that come from…!?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Please, allow me to share a most precious
secret with you all.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: I… am, in truth, a saint.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
And yet, whether by the force of fate… or
perhaps some cruel jest… I descended into
the wrong world.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
But strangely, I understood it at once. That
this is a trial bestowed upon me.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
And when I overcome it, and prove myself as
a saint… I shall reach "that place."

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: And that trial is…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: It is to surpass you. Buena.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…!
I'm… your trial?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Forgive my presumption. But… fate has
already decreed it so.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
If I can overcome you, I will be able to reach
the world I seek… At the Oaks, I look forward
to facing you.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Desire…
…Yeah. I'm looking forward to it too!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
…I don't really get it, but the Oaks is shaping
up to be one intense race…!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
"Heroine vs Saint, who will win!?"
…This is great, it's going to be huge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The storm brought on by Red Desire seems
to have only fueled the reporters' excitement.
You can feel the expectations building even
further…
choice_data_list: (I wonder if Buena will be alright…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's already a very sensitive girl. If the
intensity keeps rising like this… she might
start tensing up too much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I speak up to her, urging her
to not push herself too hard…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm totally fine, though?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I did feel a bit of that tension, yeah. But…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You'll help me catch my breath, won't you?
So knowing that, I'll be okay.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
More importantly… for the Oaks, I need to stay
even more focused.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
—I might end up blocking the path to the world
Desire is aiming for.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Going to a different world… I think that's
something really difficult. If I win, I'd be taking
that chance away from her.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The winner always carries responsibility.
I understand that, but… this one feels
especially heavy.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But even so… I can't just hand over a victory.
I have to face it properly.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Desire's world…
I wonder if it really is that far away.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …sniff. It must be so hard for her…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I try to gently talk some sense into
the ever-pure Buena Vista… Our challenge
toward the Oaks begins.
